description: Heffl is a CRM and business operations platform for managing contacts, companies, deals, tasks, quotations, projects, forms, and related workspace data. It also supports connecting AI assistants to a user's Heffl workspace via MCP.
summary: heffl.com exposes a small public discovery REST surface on the main site, two authenticated REST APIs at api.heffl.com (legacy v1 and current v2) using API keys, and an OAuth-protected MCP server at https://api.heffl.com/api/mcp.
